#+title: Collab Test Alpha
#+filetags: :collabtest:fixture:

Alpha is the first leaf node of the collab test fixture. It links back to the
[[references:collabtest:overview][Overview]] and across to its sibling
[[references:collabtest:beta][Beta]], giving the fixture a small but real link
graph (overview ↔ alpha ↔ beta).

The sentinel token QUOKKA appears only on this node, so per-node replication can
be asserted distinctly from the overview's ZEPHYRINE.
